parents.subject: LU-3285 lod: add support for DOM

commit.subject: LU-3285 lfs: add parameter for Data-on-MDT file
commit.message:
LU-3285 lfs: add parameter for Data-on-MDT file

Add --layout|-L parameter to lfs setstripe to create
file with data on MDT layout.
The LOV_PATTERN_FIRST is replaced with LOV_PATTERN_MDT now.

Signed-off-by: Mikhail Pershin <mike.pershin@intel.com>
Change-Id: Ib97142cc23c75e890dc619c14e5ffb3f3c47cda5
